title: Smart Camera Pro firmware crash
description: Smart Camera Pro experiences frequent crash reboots on firmware version v2.3.1. Multiple customers have reported the same issue. Preliminary analysis indicates a memory overflow causing abnormal firmware exits.

title: Customer return: Smart Camera Pro blurry image
description: Customers complain that the Smart Camera Pro has blurry images and fails to deliver the advertised 4K clarity. 15 similar complaints have been received so far; customers are requesting returns and refunds.

title: Payment gateway intermittent timeouts
description: The payment gateway experiences intermittent timeouts during peak hours. Average response time has increased from 200ms to 800ms. Impact scope is limited, affecting approximately 0.5% of transactions.

title: CRM data sync delay
description: The CRM system is experiencing significant data sync delays. Some customer information updates are lagging by more than 24 hours. Suspected to be related to the high error rate in the crm_sync integration.

title: Smart Camera Pro bulk return request
description: Received a bulk return request from a major customer (Yongkang Smart) involving 89 units of Smart Camera Pro. The customer states the defect rate far exceeds expectations and demands a full refund, threatening to terminate the partnership.

title: New employee IT equipment request
description: 5 new employees are onboarding in March and need standard IT equipment kits including laptops, monitors, and keyboard/mouse sets.

title: Smart Camera Pro unstable connectivity
description: Engineering testing has found that the Smart Camera Pro's Wi-Fi module has unstable connectivity, frequently dropping out in weak signal environments. The issue may be related to firmware v2.3.1.

title: Monthly report generation failure
description: The February monthly operations report generation task failed because the analytics pipeline degradation caused some data sources to become unavailable. The report was regenerated after the data team restored the pipeline.
resolution: Report regenerated after data pipeline was restored
